# Sprint 8.3 Constraint Mitigation

**Sprint:** Sprint 8. Risks Assumptions And Constraints
**Objective:** Identify and mitigate risks, assumptions, and constraints that may impact platform development and deployment.

## Description
Develop mitigation strategies for identified constraints, including data quality issues, changing business definitions, and adoption challenges.

## Deliverable
Constraint mitigation plan
